title: Dark Fantasy Portrait
description:
A dark fantasy maiden lying on the forest ground, same pose as reference — body twisted gracefully with one leg raised upward and bent, the other extended naturally, head tilted upside-down toward the viewer, soft facial expression, dreamy eyes. She wears a delicate white vintage dress with lace and feather details, slightly torn and ethereal.
Surroundings: dry grass, moss, and forest floor textures, cinematic lighting from above casting soft shadows.
A mysterious metallic skeletal hand resting on her body, dark silver armor elements contrasting with soft fabric.
Mood: melancholic, surreal, gothic fantasy atmosphere.
Lighting: soft spotlight, natural shadows, high contrast but warm tones.
Camera angle: top-down shot (bird’s-eye view), centered composition.
Style: ultra-realistic, cinematic, detailed textures, 8K, shallow depth of field, film grain, soft glow.
⚙️

title: Dark Fantasy Portrait
description:
A cinematic dark fantasy portrait of a beautiful woman kneeling in a shadowy forest at night, wearing a delicate white lace bodysuit, soft pale skin glowing under dramatic spotlight. She has long blonde hair flowing naturally, head tilted back in an emotional, dreamy pose.
She wears metallic armored gauntlets with sharp claw-like fingers, reflecting dim light, creating a contrast between softness and danger.
Surrounded by dry branches and fallen logs, moody forest environment, deep shadows, high contrast lighting, chiaroscuro style.
Soft fog in the air, subtle cinematic grain, ethereal and melancholic mood, dark gothic aesthetic.
ultra realistic, 8k, highly detailed skin texture, depth of field, dramatic lighting, masterpiece, photorealistic
